top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_women
FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A10 > 10000;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'F' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_women
FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A10 > 10000;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_women
FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A10 > 10000;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'F' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_women
FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A10 > 10000;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_women
FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.client_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A10 > 10000;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_women
FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A10 > 10000;

SELECT 
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'F' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_women
FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.client_id = (
    SELECT client_id 
    FROM disp 
    WHERE account_id = a.account_id 
    LIMIT 1
)
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A10 > 10000;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'F' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_women
FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A10 > 10000;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_women
FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A10 > 10000;
